name: draft-create
_note: world-creator.draft-create is a LENS_ACTIONS (path-3) handler in server/domains/world-creator.js, registered via domains/index.js → domainModules.forEach(mod => mod(registerLensAction)) and dispatched as handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input). It is NOT in the runMacro MACROS registry, so the macro-assassin (which enumerates MACROS) does not drive it — only the generic lens hooks world-creator.{list_mine,recent_mine} appear there. This override documents the load-bearing contract: a name < 3 chars rejects; rules are clampRules()'d into [0.5,1.5] before persistence so a poisoned 1e308/Infinity/NaN can never reach draft.rules; visibility defaults to 'private'; drafts are kept per-user in globalThis._concordSTATE.worldCreatorLens.drafts keyed by ctx.actor.userId, so no cross-user leak. Behavioral coverage lives in server/tests/world-creator-lens.test.js (the 3-arg dispatch harness).
